get.summary:
Image operational status.
Values:
* not-present: Image file is not present on this controller.
* importing: Image file import to this controller in-progress.
* verifying: Image signature verification in-progress.
* verification-failed: Image signature verification failed.
* verified: Image signature verified.
* processing: After verification image is being processed for use.
* processed: Image is verified and process, ready for replication.
* not-replicated: Image file not replicated to standby controller.
* replicating: Image file replication to standby in-progress.
* replicated: Image file present on both controllers.
A valid image will end at not-replicated or replicated status.
An invalid image bundle will reach verification-failed and be removed from disk.
